system.description: You have learned how to use your skills against restless Spirits through sacred rites, prayers, blessed objects, or mystical practices. All your actions can now affect targets who have the Spirit Gift, bypassing their immunity to physical harm. Additionally, all Wounds you inflict on Spirits cannot be ignored or regenerated by the Spirit Gift—your attacks harm their spiritual essence permanently.
system.requirement: Have a Church or Magic-related Descriptor AND talk to Father Adrien or Alizée about practices used against Spirits.
system.notes: This Gift makes the Hunter a true spirit hunter, capable of permanently harming entities like Yvonne and the Restless Spirits. Requirement details: 1) Must have appropriate Descriptor (priest, mage, witch hunter, occultist, etc.), 2) Must learn exorcism techniques from either Adrien (prayers, holy water, blessed weapons) or Alizée (spiritualist methods, binding rituals). Mechanical impact: Completely bypasses Spirit Gift's immunity and regeneration. The Hunter's sword, bullets, or bare hands can now wound spirit essence directly. Wounds dealt are permanent and don't heal when spirits dissipate. This is crucial for defeating Yvonne permanently—without this or magic, she regenerates endlessly.
